title: EB production parity deploy — main HEAD
description: Close the production parity gap by deploying the latest image from luh-tech/Ectropy-Business main to production. Current production runs buildSha a59f22e (2026-04-15); main HEAD is ~7 weeks ahead. Deploy via deploy-production-app.yml (workflow_dispatch on ref=ed6fc33, the staging-validated image SHA; main HEAD 6f6d7f4 is roadmap-only). Closes FU-EB-PROD-DEPLOY-GAP-2026-04-21. Files FU-EB-CIS-SERVICES-1-PROD-TAG-DRIFT-1 as separate FU.

outputs.description: Production runs image from main HEAD with buildSha verified end-to-end via /api/health.
acceptanceCriteria: deploy-production-app.yml workflow run completes with all 10 jobs SUCCESS: validate-cloudflare-config, confirm-check, canary-pre, compute-tag, verify-images (3 services), apply-gate-check, terraform-apply-image-tag, wait-for-config-sync, health-validation, log-release-metadata, canary-post.
Post-deploy GET https://ectropy.ai/api/health returns status=healthy with buildSha starting with ed6fc33.
n8n canary POST https://n8n.luh.tech/webhook/lead-capture returns 200 both pre-dispatch (PHASE 1) and post-deploy (PHASE 3).

outputs.description: 8-hour observation window passes with no production incidents requiring rollback.
acceptanceCriteria: 8h elapsed from PHASE 3 completion with no operator-initiated rollback.
/api/health remains status=healthy on spot-check at T+1h, T+4h, T+8h.
No emergency break-glass firewall-add invoked during window.

outputs.description: FU register updated: FU-EB-PROD-DEPLOY-GAP-2026-04-21 closed, FU-EB-CIS-SERVICES-1-PROD-TAG-DRIFT-1 filed as new open P3.
acceptanceCriteria: FU-EB-PROD-DEPLOY-GAP-2026-04-21 status transitions open -> closed with resolution.commitSha set to merge SHA of the closure PR and resolution.outcome populated.
FU-EB-CIS-SERVICES-1-PROD-TAG-DRIFT-1 lands as new open P3 entry citing the observed environment:production tag on droplet 571217813 (cis-services-1) which catalog models as env-cis.
follow-up-register.json indexes (byStatus, byPriority) rebuilt and consistent.
ajv validation passes against follow-up-register.schema.json on the resulting register state.

preMerge: Dispatch PHASE 1 reads all pass: n8n canary 200, DOCR has main short_sha tag for all 3 services (api-gateway, mcp-server, web-dashboard), baseline /api/health captured.
deploy-production-app.yml workflow run completes with all jobs SUCCESS.
PHASE 3 post-deploy reads pass: buildSha matches expected, /lb-health 200, n8n canary 200.
Closure PR opens against EB main with the FU register changes scope-locked to .roadmap/follow-up-register.json + .dlp/deliverables/d-2026-06-05-eb-prod-parity-deploy/ files only.
Closure PR CI passes (audit-workflows, roadmap-validate, etc) without --admin override.
postMerge: TRUTH-DELIVERED instance lands in luh-tech/schema-registry at schemas/_instances/truth-delivered/d-2026-06-05-eb-prod-parity-deploy.json with closureStatus.
Slack #luhtech-agents-comms canvas updated with deploy SHA, deploy timestamp, and 8h soak conclusion.
eb-agent query-followups shows FU-EB-PROD-DEPLOY-GAP-2026-04-21 closed and FU-EB-CIS-SERVICES-1-PROD-TAG-DRIFT-1 open.

transitions.trigger: L4 approval to author full deliverable
EB PR #302 squash-merged 2026-06-05T14:01:30Z at commit a4e840025c9f6adebfbc524b3df1b018701ec6be. All 3 outputs delivered. closed-clean with 4 carry-forward follow-ups noted in TRUTH-DELIVERED.

TRUTH-DELIVERED instance authored 2026-06-05T17:30:00Z at schemas/_instances/truth-delivered/d-2026-06-05-eb-prod-parity-deploy.json. closureStatus: closed-clean. relatedFollowUps (4): FU-EB-PROD-DEPLOY-GAP-2026-04-21, FU-EB-CIS-SERVICES-1-PROD-TAG-DRIFT-1, FU-EB-DEPLOY-PROD-APP-HEALTH-VALIDATION-CURL-NO-FOLLOW-1, FU-EB-VPC-PEERING-STG-PROD-ELIMINATION-1. Cross-repo doctrine F0B85LNSTC4 cycle complete on this arc.

notes:
Substrate-anchored facts at authoring time (verify at use-time per memory #10): Production currently a59f22e (2026-04-15); deploy target = ed6fc3396952caf43594e71d1c0334c6d4ed0e6e (deploy executes against ref=ed6fc33; PR #299 and #300 on main are .roadmap/*.json only and did not trigger a DOCR image build, so ed6fc33 is the canonical staging-validated image). LB ID 051530f8-c736-4358-aaef-6e273484c9fe, cert 1efd4db4-1bb8-449e-a451-516cdc655929 (read live in substrate-read 2026-06-05 R5 — memory previously held stale cc7c246b, now per memory #29 infrastructure IDs are read at use-time only). LB pool includes droplet 571217813 (cis-services-1) via environment:production tag — this is benign because cis-services-1 nginx returns 301 on /lb-health so LB excludes it via health check, but the tag itself is catalog-vs-ops drift (cis-services-1 is canonically env-cis). This deploy does not touch LB, cert, or cis-services-1; the workflow only mutates the production .env IMAGE_TAG via Spaces -> config-sync -> Watchtower. Per memory #14 Zero-SSH posture holds. Per memory #28 break-glass available during 8h observation window. CIS Tier-2 architecture (cis-services-1 deploy-agent HMAC, cis-mcp:5001 internal VPC routing, cis.luh.tech for deploy-agent observability only) is orthogonal to this deploy — separate workflow (deploy-cis-infra.yml) governs CIS infra.

[v1.0.1 RECONCILE AMENDMENT 2026-06-09] Deliverable lifecycleState reconciled with canonical TRUTH-DELIVERED already on SR main since 2026-06-05T17:30:00Z. Mixed-state substrate gap diagnosed by SR-chat substrate-before-write 2026-06-09 portfolio sweep: TRUTH-DELIVERED was authored on day-of-merge with full canonical shape (40-char mergeCommit a4e840025c9f6adebfbc524b3df1b018701ec6be, S8-closed, 4 relatedFollowUps), but the deliverable instance was never updated from S4-authored to reflect the EB merge (2026-06-05T14:01:30Z). This v1.0.1 amendment brings the deliverable into agreement with the TRUTH-DELIVERED without touching the canonical TRUTH-DELIVERED file. Full 40-char merge SHA pulled chat-side directly from the existing TRUTH-DELIVERED on SR main — no gh-CLI fetch required. Part of portfolio-wide stale-deliverable audit clearance (Batch 2 of 3 per L4-approved enterprise scope-lock exception for closure-style atomic batching, precedent SR PR #162 + #164 + #168). T1 reconcile landed via SR PR #167; URO Tier 1 T2/T3/T4 batch landed via SR PR #168; this batch covers the 2026-06-05/06 portfolio reconciles. Closure-backlog discipline filed in v1.0.1 notes (per memory #13 SUBSTRATE-CORRECTION extension): closure clearance must probe BOTH the deliverable AND the TRUTH-DELIVERED paths on SR main before authoring. Semver: PATCH (lifecycle reconcile + audit-trail completion; no behavior change to deliverable goal or scope).
